title: helichrysum funereum
intro: Helichrysum funereum, also known as the yellow mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of helichrysum funereum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential neuroprotective and anti-cancer properties. Helichrysum funereum can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
